parts.text: "Project @scheduler/ does not compile. Plan: 1) Run mvn compile in the project @scheduler/ to get the compilation errors only. 2) Generate a JavaParser source code transformation to fix the errors.    - Use the project in folder @/workspace/javaparser-base-template/ as the base project template.    - Use JavaParser AST manipulation to create the transformation.    - Save the transformation rules inside the folder @/workspace/javaparser-base-template/, e.g., in /workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java.    - Use the JavaParser API documentation located in folder /workspace/javaparser-api-docs/ for reference. 3) Ensure the generated transformation compiles correctly. 4) Apply the transformation to fix the compilation errors. 5) Verify that the project now compiles successfully with mvn compile. "

Let me break down this task:
1. Run `mvn compile` in `/workspace/scheduler/` to get compilation errors
2. Create a JavaParser transformation to fix those errors using the template in `/workspace/javaparser-base-template/`
3. Reference JavaParser API docs in `/workspace/javaparser-api-docs/`
4. Ensure the transformation compiles
5. Apply the transformation to fix the scheduler project
6. Verify the fix works with `mvn compile`

Let me start by running the compilation to see what errors we're dealing with, and also explore the template project structure.
